## Type of Change

- [ ] Skill content update
- [ ] Pipeline/tooling change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] Skills pass validation (`python sync-skills.py --validate --dry-run`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`ruff check . && black --check .`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
